theme: the demo-UI-hardening release — make a fresh browser at a demo render the working UI with ZERO manual fiddling. M31 automates a locally-trusted (mkcert) FAPI TLS cert into the demo bring-up (ONE branch in up-injected.sh step 3a-bis inside the keep-existing-cert guard, openssl self-signed fallback factored into gen_openssl_fapi_cert(), DEMO_NO_MKCERT=1 opt-out, non-fatal) so clerk-js's handshake to the fake FAPI no longer hits an untrusted cert and next-web stops blanking; fake BAPI is plain HTTP -> out of scope. M32 fixes the sibling studio-desk dead-:9100-redirect (base compose ships NODE_ENV=development which beat the image's baked production ENV through the additive override merge -> isProduction=false -> res.redirect to the dead :9100; the 1-line-class fix pins NODE_ENV=production + FRONTEND_PORT=9000 in the studio-desk override to win the additive merge back to the single-port production sendFile path) + the :9100 doc/CORS sweep (un-offset :9100 CORS origin dropped, frontend-tier.md/demo-up SKILL swept). Values-blind (no cert/key body to stdout/log), non-fatal bring-up steps, zero platform-repo edits.
code_location: rosetta-extensions @ tags house-lights-m31 (@5022e72) + house-lights-m32 (@7b17c39); final ext HEAD 7b17c39 on main. The rosetta side is docs + planning only (no code): recipe-browser-login.md §B manual->auto rewrite, frontend-tier.md cert one-liner + :9100 sweep, demo-up SKILL browser-login note + :9100 sweep + DEMO_NO_MKCERT arg-hint.
code_diff: ext: git -C .agentspace/rosetta-extensions diff 868a68a..7b17c39 — 5 files: demo-stack/up-injected.sh (M31 mkcert branch + gen_openssl_fapi_cert fallback + DEMO_NO_MKCERT parse), demo-stack/tests/test_tooling.py (+the FapiCertStep class, 11 tests), stack-injection/gen_injected_override.py (M32 studio-desk NODE_ENV=production + FRONTEND_PORT=9000 override + :9100 CORS removal), stack-injection/tests/test_injection.py (M32 +1 regression test), demo-stack/README.md (test-count reconciliation). rosetta: git diff main...release/01.70-house-lights — docs + planning only.

go_test_funcs.note: UNCHANGED from v1.6 (1027). v1.7 touched ZERO .go files across both milestones (M31 modified shell + a Python test class; M32 modified a Python generator + a Python test). Reaffirmed at both milestone metrics.json: go_total 1027, go_total_baseline_v16 1027, delta +0 — M31 'git diff 868a68a...HEAD has no .go path', M32 'touched zero .go files'. The five-module breakdown (52+223+259+333+160 = 1027) carries forward verbatim from v1.6's final ext HEAD.

python_tests.note: 459 (v1.6 close) + 11 (M31) + 1 (M32) = 471. M31: demo-stack/tests/test_tooling.py 47 -> 50 (the FapiCertStep class, +8 at build then +3 at harden); demo-stack/tests total 99 -> 110 (+11). M32: stack-injection/tests/test_injection.py 87 -> 88 (+1 regression test, test_studio_desk_env_pins_node_env_production; the harden CORS exact-set + the 2 latent env-masked fixes were assertions added/corrected on EXISTING tests, not new functions). The two growth surfaces are distinct suites (demo-stack vs stack-injection) — no double-count.
python_tests.by_suite_note: demo-stack/tests = 110 at v1.7 close (was 99 at v1.6; gitignored live stacks/ clones excluded). stack-injection/tests/test_injection.py = 88 (was 87). GUIDE.md's curated '28 unit tests' subset is unchanged (FapiCertStep deliberately excluded from the doc-pinned set, TestGuideDocTruth guard green). The stack-injection full suite ran 88/88 PASS / 0 skipped under PyYAML (py3.11, authoritative JUnit tally); 8 @skipIf(yaml is None) tests skip under the default python3 (3.14, no PyYAML) — env-skip, not failure.

flake_gate: Both milestones flake-clean. M31: FapiCertStep + full test_tooling.py (50) 5/5 randomized sequential, 50/50 PASS (per-test tempfile.mkdtemp, no shared state/ports); test_frontend_build 42/42; shellcheck 0.11.0 clean on up-injected.sh; py_compile clean on gen_injected_override.py. M32: stack-injection full suite 88/88 5/5 randomized-sequential (PYTHONHASHSEED-randomized for the dict-keyed env generator), 0 fail/err; py_compile clean on 3.11 + 3.14. The corpus README-index guard is deterministic (exit 0) on both. No CI wired (local fallback — same carry-forward as v1.5/v1.6).
coverage_snapshot: No line-coverage instrument applies to v1.7's surfaces (one bash branch in M31, a behavior-pinned unittest generator in M32) — 'coverage' = branch-enumeration + mutation evidence. M31: the 11 FapiCertStep tests cover the 4 main branches (mkcert-ok / mint-fail / DEMO_NO_MKCERT / mkcert-absent) + the keep-existing idempotency guard; the +3 harden tests closed the remaining edges (install-failure-via-||true mutation-proven, $CERTS-whitespace-quoting, crt-only partial-state guard); values-blind (tests read only fapi.crt's first line, never the fapi.key body). M32: the regression test is mutation-checked 4 ways (drop NODE_ENV / drop FRONTEND_PORT / move pins to next-web / next-web gains NODE_ENV -> all FAIL correctly; studio-desk-scoped, no false-pass) + the CORS exact-set assertion closes the over-removal/re-add gap (mutation-confirmed). No prior-section Go code touched -> the five Go modules' coverage is unchanged from v1.6. No >2pp drop on any measured surface.
field_bake: N/A as a formal milestone gate for v1.7 (no field-bake milestone in this release — the field-bake pattern was a v1.5 M25 / v1.6 M30 construct). Both M31 and M32 instead proved their observable behavior at close by composition + live probe: M31-D7 chromium trusts the mkcert cert (200) and rejects the openssl self-signed (ERR_CERT_AUTHORITY_INVALID, the exact blank-page cause) + the 11 FapiCertStep tests; M32-D5 the NODE_ENV=production pin (regression test, mutation-checked 4 ways) -> isProduction=true -> the production sendFile block covers every dev-block route (code-read M32-D1, no gap) + a close-time live merge-probe confirming the override's production/9000 pins win the additive merge (exactly one environment: key, no 9100). demo-3 had been torn down so neither re-spun an end-to-end demo render; both close rationales hold the by-composition verify as necessary+sufficient.
supply_chain: GREEN — UNCHANGED from v1.6. v1.7 adds zero dependencies: M31 is pure shell (up-injected.sh) + python-stdlib tests; M32 is a python-stdlib generator + python-stdlib tests; the rosetta side is docs only. No go.mod/go.sum change (no Go touched), no new third-party Python package, no dependency-manifest change of any kind. The five Go modules' dependency posture (0 called third-party CVEs, all-permissive licenses, go1.25.11 toolchain pin) carries forward verbatim from v1.6. No v1.7-specific dependencies.lock is required (Phase 4a found nothing new to lock).
alignment_gates: 100%/100% on all 4 Clerkenstein surfaces (untouched by v1.7 — the release hardens the demo UI tier / bring-up, no mirror-engine change).
review_summary: Per-milestone closes both GREEN. M31: 2 findings, both Fate-1 (demo-stack/README.md '13 tests' count drift -> reconciled to 50 [M31-D8]; a recorded adversarial scenario -> the zero-byte/truncated-cert existence-only keep-guard, judged NOT a regression [identical to the pre-M31 openssl-only guard] with a documented repair path [recipe §B 'Cert expiry']). M32: 4 findings, all Fate-1 (3 decision-tag blends D1/D2/D4 into frontend-tier.md's single-port + CORS notes; 1 adversarial-scenario record — the additive env-merge silently keeping base NODE_ENV=development, defended live via a merge-probe). Plus M32's 2 latent env-masked YAML-test fixes (M32-D3, Fate-1) surfaced at harden.
